userDescription: The managed Graph in Microsoft Fabric (GA) that is auto-created with the Zava Fleet Ontology (Step 16). Use for cross-domain, entity-and-relationship questions across vehicles, rental sites, and rentals.
dataSourceInstructions: Use this graph (NL2GQL) for questions about how entities relate: vehicles located at sites, idle vehicles per site, and one-way rental flows between a pickup site and a different return site. Prefer GQL MATCH patterns. NOTE (R4): attaching the ontology itself as an 'ontology' (NL2Ontology) data source is currently a UI-only step in some tenants because the Data Agent definition REST enum exposes 'graph' and 'semantic_model' but not 'ontology'. This graph source is the documented programmatic path to ontology-backed reasoning.

elements.description: Vehicle node in the Zava Fleet ontology graph.
Rental transaction node connecting a vehicle to pickup/return sites.
Relationship: a Vehicle is located at a Site.
Relationship: a Rental was picked up at a Site.
Relationship: a Rental was returned at a Site (one-way flows when pickup != return).
